stemHtml:
Refer to figure or to the ED-4 chart from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
At 10:07 you make a note of your position over the intersection of highways A3 and A92 (N48°49.0' E012°56.3'). Consider the DR positions DR-5 to DR-8 shown on the annex. Given the following information, determine your DR position at 10:16.

Compass Heading: 084°
Deviation: -3°
Variation: 3°E
Wind: Nil
GS: 104 kt
